title: How much time will pass before some CAM rip came out
display_title: How much time will pass before some CAM rip came out
wikitext:
[]: How much time will pass before some CAM-rip came out? Post by Mr. M » Sun Jan 19, 2020 5:56 am How much time will pass before some CAM-rip came out? Not all of us can be in Japan the 27th (or in other Days) and for a Western release can pass even a Year (or more). So the Only Solution is to take an eyepatch, and Surface the internet for a CAM-rip of the movie. The real question is : when will it be avaiable? A couple of weeks or more? P.S Of Course when it'll be released in theatres I'll go watching it (no CAM-rip can compete with the big screen of Cinema
